title: Aurora Cannabis (ACB) Price Target and Stock Forecast
text: Zacks Investment Research provides detailed stock forecast and price target analysis for Aurora Cannabis. Current rating: Zacks rank and rating reflects analyst sentiment on stock. Price targets compiled from multiple analyst sources tracking stock. Target price implications: Current consensus targets suggest upside opportunity if company executes on growth and profitability plans. Downside risk exists if regulatory environment deteriorates or international expansion falters. Valuation metrics: Forward P/E multiples relative to cannabis sector peers. Price-to-sales ratios based on consensus revenue estimates. PEG ratios incorporating growth rate projections. FCF yield analysis becoming increasingly relevant. EPS revisions: Analyst EPS estimate revisions tracked to assess sentiment shifts. Recent revisions may indicate updated outlook on profitability inflection timing. Negative revisions would signal reduced confidence in near-term profit generation. Growth estimates: FY2026 revenue estimate $271.75 million reflecting mid-single digit growth. EPS estimates -$0.31 showing profitability challenge despite revenue growth. Medium-term growth expectations reflect medical cannabis market opportunity. Earnings surprises: Historical earnings surprise analysis shows recent quarter volatility. Revenue beats more consistent than EPS metrics. Indicates strength in demand but challenges in cost management. Forecast accuracy: Zacks track analyst forecast accuracy metrics. Cannabis sector typically shows wider forecast ranges due to regulatory uncertainty. Aurora historically within range of analyst expectations.
